description: Use this API to compare specified power flow data and solution results, as contained in the working case, with those of a designated Saved Case (activity DIFF). It must be referenced first with APIOPT=1, followed by any number of references with APIOPT=2, followed by one reference with APIOPT=3: This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, seqflg = diff(sid, all, apiopt, status, thrsh, cfile)
python_syntax: ierr, seqflg = diff(sid, all, apiopt, status, thrsh, cfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: apiopt
parameters.description: Mode of operation in the api. (input).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of 4 elements specifying STATUS contains various processing options and has different values or meanings depending on the value of APIOPT. (input).

parameters.name: thrsh
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying thresholds (only used when APIOPT is 2). (input).

parameters.name: cfile
parameters.description: Saved case to be compared against the data currently in the working case (only used when apiopt is 1). (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: seqflg
return_values.description: An array of two elements specifying returned when APIOPT = 1. (output).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

apiopt.description: run case comparison for specified data category.

status.description: working case or threshold option (0 by default).
If APIOPT=1 or 3, leave original case as working case. If APIOPT=2, thresholds are in enginering units.
If APIOPT=1 or 3, leave comparison case (CFILE) as working case. If APIOPT=2, thresholds are percentages.
If APIOPT=1, bus numbers must be the same to match (default for APIOPT=1 or 3).
If APIOPT=1, bus names must be the same to match. If APIOPT=2, compare bus identifiers (default for APIOPT=2).
If APIOPT=1, bus numbers and names must be the same to match. If APIOPT=2, compare bus type codes.
(If APIOPT=2) compare generator MW or MVAR.
(If APIOPT=2) compare line R, X, & B.
(If APIOPT=2) compare from P or Q flow.
(If APIOPT=2) compare from and to P or Q flow.
(If APIOPT=2) compare P or Q losses.
(If APIOPT=2) compare zero sequence R, X, & B.
(If APIOPT=2) compare zero sequence line shunts.
(If APIOPT=2) compare multisection line metered end.
(If APIOPT=2) compare from and to P flow.
(If APIOPT=2) compare from and to Q flow.
(If APIOPT=2) compare switching device P or Q flow.
(If APIOPT=2) compare switching device P flow.
(If APIOPT=2) compare switching device Q flow.
load characteric comparison option (0 by default).
use total nominal load (only used if APIOPT=2).
use contant MVA (only used if APIOPT=2).
use constant current (only used if APIOPT=2).
use constant admittance (only used if APIOPT=2).
line rating to use. (1 by default).
use all ratings (only used if APIOPT=2).
use rating specified (only used if APIOPT=2).

thrsh.description: voltage or tap ratio threshold (0.0 by default).

seqflg.description: true if there is sequence data in the working case.
true if there is sequence data in the Saved Case in file CFILE.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
error building the case to case translation files.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
